expectations.text: Returns a commit decision instead of a stop.
Selects only the staged bugfix files and excludes unstaged README noise.
Uses commit message shape with Summary, Rationale, Tests, and trailer block.
expectations.evidence: fix(rate-limit): correct retry backoff and add coverage

expectations.text: Uses Fixes #456 and the default Copilot trailer.
expectations.evidence:
fix(rate-limit): correct retry backoff and add coverage

Summary:
- Fix retry backoff logic for rate limiting and add tests.

Rationale:
- Backoff previously too short causing request storms under throttling.

Tests:
- pytest tests/test_rate_limit.py

Fixes #456
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

expectations.text: Plans both push and PR creation.
Sets the PR title to the commit subject and includes the issue in the body.
expectations.evidence:
{"pr_title": "correct retry backoff and add coverage", "subject": "correct retry backoff and add coverage", "pr_body": "Summary:
- correct retry backoff and add coverage

Issues:
Fixes #456"}
